programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: O irmão rico de Chris vem para Chicago e se apropria da vida de Chris, incluindo seu negócio, o Rigby's. Chris se nega a trabalhar para seu irmão e viver com ele em sua casa.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: É o Primeiro de abril e Kenan e Kel brincam e fazem pegadinhas com todos. No entanto, as coisas começam a complicar as piadas fazem todos serem presos.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: Nesse episódio especial, Kenan e Kel se reúnem para ver algumas gravações que relembram os momentos mais divertidos da série nesses quatros anos que se passaram.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.sub-title: Duas cabeças pensam melhor do que nenhuma - Parte 1
programme.desc: Os Rockmore decidem fazer uma viagem em família e Kel se esconde no carro para ir junto com eles. Enquanto passam a primeira noite em um acampamento, Kenan tem um encontro com um ser misterioso.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.sub-title: Duas cabeças pensam melhor do que nenhuma - Parte 2
programme.desc: Quando o carro da família estraga, Kenan e Kel saem em busca de ajuda e acabam sendo convidados para jantar na mansão de um homem desconhecido.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.sub-title: Duas cabeças pensam melhor do que nenhuma - Parte 3
programme.desc: Quando um dos convidados desaparece, Kenan e Kel suspeitam que seus misteriosos anfitriões estão, de alguma maneira, envolvidos nisso.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: Kenan quer comprar um carro. Com a ajuda de seu amigo Kel, Kenan consegue comprar um carro bastante econômico, até descobrir que se trata de um carro roubado!

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: Kenan resolve processar uma empresa de peixes depois de quase se afogar com um parafuso que estava dentro de sua lata de atum.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.sub-title: Fazendo as coisas ao estilo Hemingway
programme.desc: Kenan lê um livro do autor Ernest Hemingway que o inspira a criar uma lista de metas para ter uma vida mais completa. Enquanto isso, Kel também tenta estabelecer as suas próprias metas.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: Quando de repente Kel parece ter poderes paranormais, Kenan conduz seu amigo ao "caminho da fama", o escrevendo para participar de um show ao vivo para demonstrar estes poderes.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: Kenan e Kel são barrados ao tentar entrar em uma boate, então Kenan se sente inspirado a criar a sua própria boate - no Rigby's!

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: Kenan consegue um encontro com sua amada Brianna, mas o momento é seguido por várias desventuras e eventos infelizes.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: Kenan e Kel ficam chocados quando se deparam com um retrato falado de Roger, pai de Kenan, sendo procurado por roubar milhões de dólares em diamantes.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: Para combater a gripe de Kel, Kenan acidentalmente descobre a cura para a gripe usando uma combinação de galinha, ovos, sardinha e refrigerante de laranja.

programme.title: Kenan e Kel
programme.desc: Kenan guardou dinheiro o suficiente para comprar uma nova bicicleta bem em tempo do Natal. Mas será que ele gastará todo esse dinheiro com um presente para ele mesmo?

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: D.A. Julie March refuses to back away from a closed case in which her prime murder suspect commits suicide and, after his death, allegedly disposes of a missing murder weapon.

programme.title: Matlock: The Trial (Part 1)
programme.desc: When an Assistant District Attorney is murdered, Matlock is asked to switch sides and act as Special Prosecutor for the state of Georgia.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Tony Morgan, a smooth-talking, seemingly perfect son, frames his mother for murder, no one even suspects his involvement. No one except Ben Matlock, who tries to prove the good boy isn’t so good after all.

programme.title: Matlock: The Trial (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s investigation as the state’s Special Prosecutor uncovers a judicial conspiracy involving two judges and a corporate lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A craving for a down-home barbecue in the inner city leads Matlock into a dangerous situation. After his car breaks down, he’s mugged at knifepoint. Even his barbecue dinner is stolen! However; one good samaritan, Stan Johnson, comes to his aid.

programme.title: Matlock: The Accident
programme.desc: Matlock’s client is accused of killing his ambulance-chasing lawyer who specializes in cases of personal injury – especially when the injuries occur at a local amusement park.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock learns there is more to an exclusive health spa than workouts when his client, Donna Stewart, is accused of murdering a sexy, young exercise instructor who had been having an affair with her husband.

programme.title: Matlock: The Celebrity
programme.desc: Ben Matlock flies out to Hollywood to defend a beautiful former actress, Catherine Welden, who formed a lucrative cosmetic business only to be accused of murdering an ex-lover who was blackmailing her.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock discovers the private life of a personal trainer includes sizzling secrets that might shatter the reputations of several socialites. Harry Slade puts Casanova to shame, but it costs him his life.

programme.title: Matlock: The Witness Killings (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Matlock and his daughter Leanne arrive at a seaside resort to plan their new law partnership, they discover the manager has been murdered.

programme.title: Matlock: The Witness Killings (Part 2)
programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A chef is charged with the murder of her ex-husband.

programme.title: Matlock: The Strangler
programme.desc: Matlock’s personal accountant seeks representation by Ben when he is framed for the brutal murder of his employer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Nightmare
programme.desc: A vacation to a wild west ghost town becomes more than Matlock bargained for as a bump on the head takes him straight back in time to the real old wild west, surrounded by familiar faces – with very unfamiliar occupations.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock exposes skimming and corruption when he defends undercover narcotics officer Johnny Bauer against murder charges.

programme.title: Matlock: The Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: Matlock’s dull, droning insurance broker, Allan Corning finds therapy for his struggling marriage interrupted by the sudden murder of his therapist, Dr. Harding Fletcher.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Matlock: The Dame
programme.desc: When Matlock is slapped by an attractive older woman in a restaurant, Ben recalls to Julie the story of his first case – the murder of the man who put him through law school.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Judge Carter Addison murders his cheating mistress and frames her lover. Then the judge presides over the man's trial with Ben Matlock as the defense counsel.

programme.title: Matlock: The Suspect (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock comes to the aid of a young socialite accused of murdering her older husband for money.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Nora Dawson, a witness to a murder, is committed to an asylum and is being systematically driven out of her mind with drugs when the IMF team is given twenty-four hours to save her life.

programme.desc: The IMF attempts to clear an American businessman in Japan of false charges that he murdered his Japanese wife in "Butterfly," a segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Posing as a bag woman for a crooked politician, Casey unknowingly carries an attached case locked to her wrist filled with both money and a bomb set to explode upon opening.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Homecoming
programme.desc: Phelps returns to his hometown on personal business, only to find his once happy surroundings in a state of panic caused by a mysterious series of deaths of the young townswomen on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.desc: Gangsters running a loan-shark racket in Hawaii short-circuit the IMF team's investigation when they capture Willy and feed him gigantic doses of truth serum.

programme.title: The Poison Rose - Dunkle Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Carson Philips ist ein ehemaliger Football-Star und derzeitiger Alkoholiker, der als Privatdetektiv in Los Angeles arbeitet. Er kehrt in seine texanische Heimatstadt Galveston zurück, um nach einer vermissten Frau zu suchen.

programme.title: Freiheit - John Newton's Amazing Grace
programme.desc: Im Jahr 1856 fliehen der Sklave Samuel und seine Familie von einer Plantage in Richtung Kanada. Ein Jahrhundert zuvor reist Kapitän John Newton von Afrika nach Amerika mit einer Menge Sklaven an Bord, darunter auch Samuels Urgroßvater.

programme.desc: In part one of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the crew discuss the show's origins and the DIY feel of the early seasons.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Indestructible Man
programme.desc: In Indestructible Man, a violent criminal named Butcher Benson is executed and becomes indestructible when he’s brought back to life.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: King Dinosaur
programme.desc: In King Dinosaur, the crew pokes fun as scientists are terrorized by snakes, bugs, and dinosaurs on a newly discovered planet.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.sub-title: Boggy Creek II: And The Legend Continues
programme.desc: A professor and his students camp out in the rural Arkansas swamp, in hopes of finding a Bigfoot-like creature.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Mighty Jack
programme.desc: A secret organization called Mighty Jack (1968) uses a submarine to battle a terrorist organization. Joel and the Bots make a Mighty Jack pet food commercial and sing the song "Slow The Plot Down!".
